name: Whole Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour once, then measure and add baking powder, sugar, and salt. Sift again.
2. Pour milk over whole bran. Add egg and fat to the bran mixture. Stir in the flour as little as possible.
3. Bake in greased muffin pans in a hot oven at 425°F for 20 minutes.
